summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Magic Garden of Knowledge (Волшебный Сад Знаний) - a Russian child psychology diagnostic platform. All backend APIs and frontend navigation flows are working perfectly.
passed_tests: Get statistics API works with authentication
Landing page loads with correct title and role cards
Child navigation flow: landing → child name → games page
Psychologist navigation flow: landing → login → dashboard
Psychologist registration and login forms work
Dashboard displays statistics and game results correctly
Full end-to-end data flow: child registration → game results → psychologist dashboard
